item-1.question: What are credits and how do I use them?
item-1.answer: Credits are used to generate AI videos and images. Each generation consumes a certain number of credits based on the complexity and quality of the output. You can view your credit balance in your dashboard and purchase additional credits or subscribe to a plan that includes monthly credits.

item-2.question: Can I try before subscribing?
item-2.answer: Yes! We offer a free tier that includes limited credits so you can experience our AI video and image generation capabilities before committing to a paid plan. Sign up for free and start creating today.

item-3.question: Can I subscribe for just one month without auto-renewal?
item-3.answer: Yes, you can subscribe to our monthly plan and cancel anytime before the next billing cycle. You'll retain access to all premium features until the end of your current billing period. Simply manage your subscription from your account settings.

item-4.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
item-4.answer: You can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings. Go to Dashboard > Billing > Manage Subscription. After cancellation, you'll continue to have access to premium features until the end of your current billing period.

item-5.question: Can I purchase more credits separately when I run out?
item-5.answer: Absolutely! In addition to the credits included in your subscription, you can purchase credit packages separately at any time. These one-time credit purchases never expire and can be used whenever you need extra generation capacity.

item-6.question: I upgraded my membership, how are credits calculated?
item-6.answer: When you upgrade your plan, your existing credits remain in your account. You'll immediately receive the credits included in your new plan, and your monthly credit refresh will be adjusted to match your new tier. Any unused credits from your previous plan will continue to be available.

item-7.question: Will videos have watermarks? How to remove them?
item-7.answer: Free tier videos include a small watermark. Pro and Lifetime plan subscribers can generate videos and images without any watermarks. Upgrade to any paid plan to remove watermarks from all your creations.

item-8.question: Can I use AI-generated videos for commercial purposes?
item-8.answer: Yes! All content generated with a paid subscription (Pro or Lifetime) can be used for commercial purposes. You retain full ownership and commercial rights to all videos and images you create. Free tier content may have usage restrictions.

item-9.question: Which devices can I use my membership on?
item-9.answer: Your membership works on all devices including desktop computers, laptops, tablets, and smartphones. Simply log in to your account from any device with a web browser. Your credits and settings are synced across all devices.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: Discover how Gemini Omni is advancing AI image generation and editing with cutting-edge technology. Learn about our mission to make high-quality visual creation accessible to everyone.

hero.title: About Gemini Omni
hero.subtitle: Revolutionizing visual content creation with cutting-edge AI technology

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: At Gemini Omni, our mission is to democratize professional-grade AI image generation and editing. We believe that everyone should have access to powerful tools that can turn ideas, prompts, and reference images into polished visual assets. By leveraging advanced AI technology, we're removing the barriers of traditional visual production and making high-quality creation faster, more affordable, and more accessible for businesses and creators worldwide.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We push the boundaries of AI technology to deliver advanced image generation and editing capabilities.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: Complex technology, simple interface. We make powerful AI accessible to everyone, regardless of technical expertise.

community.title: Community
community.description: We build tools that empower creators, businesses, and professionals to bring their visual content to life.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Gemini Omni was born from a simple observation: traditional visual production is expensive, time-consuming, and often out of reach for small businesses and individual creators. Teams spend hours briefing, shooting, editing, and revising assets. We knew there had to be a faster way.
story.paragraph2: Combining expertise in computer vision, deep learning, and creative tooling, our team developed an AI system that can analyze prompts and reference images to generate polished visuals in seconds. What once took hours now takes minutes. What once required a full production workflow can now start from a prompt or a single image.
story.paragraph3: Today, thousands of e-commerce businesses, marketers, designers, and content creators use Gemini Omni to transform their visual workflows. We're constantly improving our technology, adding new features, and making high-quality image generation and editing more accessible to everyone.

cta.title: Join Us on This Journey
cta.description: Start creating high-quality AI images today and see why thousands trust Gemini Omni

meta.title: GPT Image 2 API — REST API for GPT Image 2 Model
meta.description: GPT Image 2 API with credits-based pricing. One token, two endpoints, 1 credit per image — use the GPT Image 2 API from any backend. As low as $0.05 per generated image.

hero.title: GPT Image 2 API — generate images with one token
hero.subtitle: The GPT Image 2 API is a simple, credits-based REST API for the gpt-image-2 model. Ship production image generation with one Bearer token and zero vendor lock-in.

features.title: Why teams pick the GPT Image 2 API
features.subtitle: Everything you need to ship image generation, nothing you don't.

oneModel.title: One model, one token
oneModel.description: The GPT Image 2 API exposes gpt-image-2 behind a single Bearer token. No SDKs required — if your stack can POST JSON, it can call the GPT Image 2 API in under a minute.

credits.title: Transparent credits pricing
credits.description: The GPT Image 2 API charges 1 credit per generated image. Buy any credit pack once and spend it across the GPT Image 2 API, the web dashboard, or scheduled jobs — credits never expire.

programmable.title: Production-ready primitives
programmable.description: Submit jobs, poll status, and stream images from our CDN. The GPT Image 2 API is tuned for automations, LLM agents, and server-side rendering where latency and reliability matter.

quickStart.title: Quick start with the GPT Image 2 API
quickStart.description: Create a key from your dashboard, export it, and hit the submit endpoint. Your first GPT Image 2 API call takes under a minute.

endpoints.title: Two endpoints, everything the GPT Image 2 API needs

submit.title: Submit a generation
submit.description: Create a new image task on the GPT Image 2 API. Costs n credits (default 1).

params.prompt: prompt (string, required) — the text prompt to generate from.
params.n: n (integer, 1) — number of images. Apimart currently supports 1 only.
params.referenceImages: reference_images (string[]) — up to 16 reference image URLs (or base64 data URIs). Alias: image_urls.

query.title: Poll for the result
query.description: Fetch the status of a GPT Image 2 API task. Poll every 1–2 seconds until status is "completed" or "failed".
query.note: Image URLs returned by the GPT Image 2 API are always served from our CDN — never the upstream provider, so your users never leak our routing.

pricing.title: GPT Image 2 API pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple credits. One image, one credit. Pay once, use anywhere.
pricing.intro: The GPT Image 2 API uses the same credit wallet as the web app. Buy a pack, receive credits instantly, and spend them through the GPT Image 2 API or the dashboard. No subscription, no minimum, no expiring credits. The more credits you buy, the lower the effective cost per generated image on the GPT Image 2 API.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: A great starting pack for hobby projects and early GPT Image 2 API integrations.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Most popular. Ideal for teams shipping the GPT Image 2 API into a production product.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Best rate. For batch pipelines and heavy GPT Image 2 API workloads.

pricing.footnote: All GPT Image 2 API calls bill against the same credit balance as the dashboard — switch between surfaces without splitting wallets.

useCases.title: What you can build with the GPT Image 2 API
useCases.subtitle: A few patterns our customers ship with the GPT Image 2 API today.

agents.title: LLM agents & tools
agents.description: Wire the GPT Image 2 API into LangChain, agent frameworks, or custom orchestration. One tool definition, one token, and your agent can generate imagery on demand.

content.title: Automated content pipelines
content.description: Generate hero images, thumbnails, and social assets in bulk. The GPT Image 2 API is async — submit a batch, poll status, and persist the CDN URLs our response returns.

products.title: End-user product features
products.description: Add image generation to your SaaS without operating your own GPU fleet. The GPT Image 2 API handles moderation, retries, and CDN delivery — you handle the UX.

faq.title: GPT Image 2 API — frequently asked questions

subscribe.question: Do I need a subscription to use the GPT Image 2 API?
subscribe.answer: No — any credit package works. You just need at least one completed purchase to create a GPT Image 2 API key. Credits can be spent on either the API or the web dashboard.

model.question: What model powers the GPT Image 2 API?
model.answer: The GPT Image 2 API uses gpt-image-2 — the same model you get in the web dashboard, with the same quality and safety policies.

webhooks.question: Does the GPT Image 2 API provide webhooks?
webhooks.answer: Not yet — poll the query endpoint for now. Webhook delivery is on the GPT Image 2 API roadmap.

rateLimit.question: What is the GPT Image 2 API rate limit?
rateLimit.answer: The GPT Image 2 API has generous defaults that fit most workloads. If you need heavier throughput, reach out and we will scale your key.

finalCta.title: Ready to ship with the GPT Image 2 API?
finalCta.subtitle: Grab a key and generate your first image with the GPT Image 2 API in under a minute.

effects.title: Effects
effects.heading: AI Effects
effects.subtitle: Trending AI effect templates — turn a single photo into a viral clip.

aiTools.title: AI Tools
aiTools.heading: AI Tools
aiTools.subtitle: Practical AI utilities — background changer, watermark remover, face swap and more.

features.title: Gemini Omni Features
features.subtitle: Revolutionary Gemini Omni capabilities
features.description: Explore the powerful features that make our Gemini Omni platform a leading choice for AI image generation and editing

item-1.title: Instant Gemini Omni Generation
item-1.description: Generate polished images instantly with our Gemini Omni technology. Our advanced algorithms analyze your prompt and references to create high-quality visuals in seconds with stronger composition, detail, and prompt accuracy.

item-2.title: High-Quality Gemini Omni Output
item-2.description: Experience exceptional quality with our Gemini Omni generation. Every output is built for cleaner detail, better text rendering, and more consistent results across image variations and edits.

item-3.title: Customizable Gemini Omni
item-3.description: Control your Gemini Omni output with precision. Guide style, layout, lighting, subject details, and edit intent to match your exact creative needs while keeping the workflow fast and flexible.

item-4.title: Batch Gemini Omni Processing
item-4.description: Process multiple images simultaneously with our Gemini Omni batch feature. Scale your Gemini Omni workflow effortlessly and generate hundreds of visual assets with a single click using our enterprise-grade infrastructure.

features2.title: Why Choose Gemini Omni
features2.subtitle: The most advanced Gemini Omni solution
features2.description: Our Gemini Omni platform combines cutting-edge technology with user-friendly design to deliver a fast, reliable AI image workflow built for modern Gemini Omni use cases.

features3.title: Advanced Gemini Omni Capabilities
features3.subtitle: Next-generation Gemini Omni technology
features3.description: Push the boundaries of what's possible with Gemini Omni. Our platform offers advanced features designed for professionals and enterprises that want more from Gemini Omni workflows.

item-1.title: Smart Gemini Omni Prompt Understanding
item-1.description: Our Gemini Omni system interprets prompts and references more accurately to produce outputs that stay closer to your creative intent.

pricing.title: Gemini Omni Pricing

image.title: FAQS About Gemini Omni Video Generator
image.subtitle: Common questions about Gemini Omni Video Generator

item-1.question: What is Gemini Omni technology?
item-1.answer: Gemini Omni is an advanced AI image generation and editing technology built to create high-quality visuals from prompts and reference images. Our system uses sophisticated algorithms to understand composition, text, lighting, and visual context so it can produce polished results across many creative use cases.

item-2.question: How does Gemini Omni generation work?
item-2.answer: Our Gemini Omni platform analyzes your prompt and optional reference images, then generates or edits visuals based on your instructions. The process is fully automated and typically completes in seconds, producing high-quality outputs for marketing, product, portrait, and design workflows powered by Gemini Omni Video Generator.

item-3.question: What can I use Gemini Omni Video Generator for?
item-3.answer: Gemini Omni is useful for e-commerce product images, marketing creatives, portraits, concept art, social content, UI mockups, and many other visual workflows. It helps teams move faster by reducing manual design, editing, and production work.

item-4.question: Is there a free trial for Gemini Omni Video Generator?
item-4.answer: Yes, we offer a free trial so you can experience Gemini Omni technology firsthand. Try our Gemini Omni platform with no commitment and see the difference it makes in your visual content creation.

item-5.question: How do I get support for Gemini Omni Video Generator?
item-5.answer: Our Gemini Omni support team is available 24/7 to help you. Contact us with any questions about the product, implementation, prompt strategy, or best practices for image generation and editing.

video.title: Gemini Omni FAQ
video.subtitle: Common questions about Google's next-gen AI video model

item-1.question: Is this website the official Gemini Omni from Google?
item-1.answer: No. This is an independent platform that provides hosted access to Gemini Omni alongside other leading video models like Seedance, Wan, and more. Gemini, Google, and Veo are trademarks of their respective owners — we are not affiliated with Google or Google DeepMind. We exist to give you one place to use the top AI video models without juggling separate accounts or waitlists.

item-2.question: Why use this site instead of the Gemini app directly?
item-2.answer: Three reasons: (1) no Google account, region lock, or waitlist — pay with a card and start in seconds; (2) you can use Gemini Omni side-by-side with other top models like Seedance and Wan (with more coming) in one workspace; (3) credits work across every model on the platform, so you are not locked into a single provider's quota.

item-3.question: What inputs does it support?
item-3.answer: Gemini Omni accepts text prompts, image inputs (up to 5 images for image-to-video or character references), and video inputs (1 video for Remix and video-to-video editing). You can mix them inside a single chat conversation.

item-4.question: How long are Gemini Omni Video Generator videos, and what resolution?
item-4.answer: Gemini Omni generates 10-second video clips. You can choose the aspect ratio before generation, or upload a reference image or video and Omni will match it by default.

item-5.question: What makes Gemini Omni Video Generator different from Sora 2, Seedance, or Kling?
item-5.answer: The biggest differentiator is chat-based editing and Remix — you keep editing the generated video by replying in the same conversation, no timeline, no separate editor. Sora 2, Seedance 2, and Kling V3.0 are primarily generators; Gemini Omni is positioned as generator plus conversational editor, with Gemini's reasoning and world knowledge built in.

item-6.question: Will Gemini Omni have an API?
item-6.answer: Google announced that Gemini Omni will reach developers and enterprise customers through the Gemini API in the weeks following I/O 2026. This site provides hosted access to Gemini Omni today — no waitlist required.

item-7.question: How much will it cost?
item-7.answer: Gemini Omni Video Generator is available on our credit-based plans. Lite starts at $29.90/mo for 600 credits (around 60 videos), Pro plans range from $35–$97/mo, and Premium is $159/mo for 5,700 credits. See the Pricing page for current options, or buy credit packs as needed.

item-3.title: Images Processed with Gemini Omni Video Generator

image.title: Start with Gemini Omni Today
image.description: Join thousands of professionals using Gemini Omni Video Generator to create high-quality visual assets. Experience the power of Gemini Omni technology and transform your visual content creation workflow.

video.title: Create Stunning Videos with Gemini Omni Video Generator
video.description: Generate cinematic videos from a single prompt and refine every shot through natural in-chat editing. Explore prompts, demos and creative use cases to see what Gemini Omni can do for your next project.

image.title: How It Works
image.subtitle: Get started in just three simple steps

step1.title: Upload Your Image
step1.description: Simply upload any image you want to transform with Gemini Omni Video Generator

step2.title: AI Processing
step2.description: Our advanced AI analyzes your input and generates polished results instantly

step3.title: Download Results
step3.description: Get your high-quality images ready to use in seconds

video.title: How Gemini Omni works
video.subtitle: Get from idea to a finished 10-second video in three steps — prompt, generate, then edit by replying, all inside one chat.

step1.title: Describe Your Scene
step1.description: Sign in and describe the video you want in natural language. Add up to 5 reference images or a video clip to lock in characters, style, or motion — Gemini Omni Video Generator handles the rest.

step2.title: Generate with Gemini Omni Video Generator
step2.description: Send your text prompt, drop in an image as first or last frame, or upload a clip to remix. Gemini Omni Video Generator returns a 10-second video with synchronized native audio and cinematic motion.

step3.title: Edit by Replying
step3.description: Don't like a detail? Reply in the same chat — swap an object, change the lighting, extend the shot. Gemini Omni Video Generator's chat-based editing is the loop that replaces the traditional timeline.

image.title: Why Teams Use Gemini Omni Video Generator
image.subtitle: Built for image generation that feels practical, controllable, and ready for production

tab1.label: Text Accuracy
tab1.title: Stronger In-Image Text Rendering
tab1.tagline: Headlines, labels, and short UI copy that are far more usable
tab1.description: Create posters, social graphics, landing page visuals, and product images with clearer titles, buttons, signage, and multi-word phrases directly inside the image.

tab2.label: UI Mockups
tab2.title: Better UI, App, and Product Screens
tab2.tagline: Generate interfaces that look closer to real software
tab2.description: Build dashboard concepts, phone screens, browser windows, feature previews, and product mockups that fit SaaS landing pages, ads, and App Store style presentations.

tab3.label: Natural Detail
tab3.title: More Natural-Looking Visuals
tab3.tagline: Cleaner lighting, materials, and detail consistency
tab3.description: Generate portraits, beauty shots, product visuals, and campaign imagery with a more photographic feel and less of the brittle, synthetic look common in weaker image models.

tab4.label: Prompt Control
tab4.title: More Reliable Multi-Constraint Prompt Following
tab4.tagline: Hold subject placement, style, copy, and background together
tab4.description: Handle prompts with several conditions at once, such as exact subject positions, specific text, a fixed background, and a defined visual style, with fewer off-target generations.

video.title: What Gemini Omni brings to creators
video.subtitle: Replacing Veo inside the Gemini app — Google calls it 'Nano Banana for video' — Gemini Omni Video Generator brings four capabilities that matter most: world understanding, reference anything, conversational editing, and a recurring cast.

tab1.label: World Understanding
tab1.title: World Understanding
tab1.tagline: AI video grounded in how the world actually works
tab1.description: Gemini Omni Video Generator is built on Gemini's vast knowledge of history, science, and culture, so it produces 10-second clips that are grounded in real-world physics and context — proteins fold the way proteins fold, water moves the way water moves, period scenes look the way they should.

tab2.label: Reference Anything
tab2.title: Reference Anything
tab2.tagline: Mix text, image, audio, and video into one coherent video
tab2.description: Gemini Omni Video Generator extends Gemini's native multimodality — blend any combination of text, audio, image, and video inputs into a high-quality, consistent 10-second AI video. Use up to 5 reference images plus a clip to lock in characters, style, and motion.

tab3.label: Conversational Editing
tab3.title: Conversational Editing
tab3.tagline: Like Nano Banana, but for video
tab3.description: Edit your video using natural language. Gemini Omni Video Generator lets you change characters, settings, and styles by just describing what you want — swap an object, restyle a scene, extend a shot. The chat-based AI video editor replaces the timeline with a reply in the same conversation.

tab4.label: Recurring Cast
tab4.title: Recurring Cast
tab4.tagline: Characters that keep their voice and face across every scene
tab4.description: Create a recurring cast for your project. From protagonists to background players, your characters carry full vocal and visual consistency from one scene to the next — Gemini Omni Video Generator locks in identity so your AI video series stays on-brand and on-character.

image.title: Made for Real Creative Work
image.subtitle: The strongest use cases are the ones that help teams ship marketing, product, and brand visuals faster

item1.title: Production-Ready Marketing Assets
item1.description: Create ad creatives, hero images, campaign visuals, posters, and social assets that often need far less manual cleanup before they are ready to use.

item2.title: Faster Product and SaaS Visualization
item2.description: Turn feature ideas into polished dashboard mockups, mobile screenshots, UI concepts, and launch visuals that explain the product without a full design sprint.

item3.title: Stable Results from Complex Briefs
item3.description: Push more detailed prompts into one generation, combining composition, text, styling, and subject constraints without losing the overall direction of the image.

video.title: Why Gemini Omni matters
video.subtitle: Gemini Omni collapses the video stack — generation, remix, and editing — into one Gemini conversation, instead of four disconnected tools.

item1.title: Cinematic Realism
item1.description: Generate stunning, hyper-realistic videos up to 10 seconds long. Gemini Omni Video Generator delivers cinematic motion, native audio, and lifelike in-frame text — production-grade AI video generation in a single pass.

item2.title: Multi-modal References
item2.description: Blend multiple images, characters, and voices into one AI video. Use up to 5 reference images plus a video clip to keep characters consistent, transfer style, and direct the action — Gemini Omni's chat-based AI video generator turns mixed inputs into a coherent 10-second video.

item3.title: Video-to-Video Editing
item3.description: Transform, restyle, and perfect your footage with simple text instructions. Upload a clip and Gemini Omni Video Generator restyles, recomposes, or extends it inside the Gemini chat — the closest thing to a conversational AI video editor.

image.title: Built for Image Work That Ships
image.subtitle: From product marketing to UI previews, Gemini Omni fits workflows where image generation needs to save real production time

item1.title: E-commerce
item1.description: Generate product launches, merchandising graphics, packaging previews, and catalog assets with clearer text and cleaner visual consistency.

item2.title: Marketing Teams
item2.description: Produce campaign graphics, ad creatives, multilingual social posts, and landing page heroes that are closer to ready on the first pass.

item3.title: Design & Creative
item3.description: Explore visual directions, art styles, and tightly constrained concepts while maintaining better control over layout and prompt intent.

item4.title: Fashion & Beauty
item4.description: Create portraits, beauty campaigns, and editorial product imagery with more natural-looking skin, materials, and lighting detail.

item5.title: Product & SaaS
item5.description: Generate app screens, dashboards, browser scenes, and feature mockups for launches, investor decks, and App Store style previews.

item6.title: Agencies & In-House Teams
item6.description: Move from idea to usable campaign visuals faster by reducing reshoots, repetitive mockup work, and post-production cleanup.

video.title: What you'll be able to build with Gemini Omni Video Generator
video.subtitle: From educational videos to chat-edited short-form ads, Gemini Omni is positioned to cover the full conversational video creation loop — once it ships at Google I/O 2026.

item1.title: Educational Explainers
item1.description: The Gemini Omni chalkboard demo — a professor writing trig identities — showed first-tier in-video text rendering, making it a strong fit for math, physics, and tutorial content.

item2.title: Short-Form Social Video
item2.description: Combine text-to-video with reference images and style controls to ship on-brand vertical clips at the pace TikTok, Reels, and Shorts demand.

item3.title: Ad & Marketing Creatives
item3.description: Pitch product spots and brand films before a full production budget exists — then iterate via chat-based editing instead of round-tripping through a motion designer.

item4.title: Remix Existing Footage
item4.description: Upload a clip and ask Gemini Omni Video Generator to restyle it, extend it, or swap a scene. Remix is the headline differentiator that Google chose to spotlight inside the UI.

item5.title: Enterprise Training Video
item5.description: Native audio generation makes Gemini Omni a strong fit for internal training videos, product walkthroughs, and onboarding content — generated and edited in one chat.

item6.title: Agent Workflows via API
item6.description: Gemini Omni rolls out through the Gemini API in the weeks following I/O 2026 as an Agent. Builders can chain it with Imagen, Nano Banana, and the main Gemini model into end-to-end creative pipelines.

UseCases.imageTitle: Examples of what Gemini Omni can do
UseCases.imageSubtitle: Real-world examples of what Gemini Omni can do

item-1.title: Chalkboard Math Proof (the viral demo)
item-1.description: A professor writes out a mathematical proof for trigonometric identities on a traditional chalkboard, explaining the step he is currently on in the equation. — The demo that drew comparisons to a 'video Nano Banana moment' for in-frame text rendering.

item-2.title: Seaside Dinner (the Spaghetti Test)
item-2.description: A seaside dinner scene with two friends eating spaghetti, talking, and clinking glasses at sunset. — A second demo showing native dialogue audio, sunset lighting, and natural cut coherence.

item-3.title: Image-to-Video from a Single Frame
item-3.description: Use my uploaded image as the first frame. Push the camera in slowly, let the subject turn toward camera, soft natural light, shallow depth of field — a typical Gemini Omni Video Generator image-to-video prompt, 10 seconds.

item-4.title: Remix an Existing Clip
item-4.description: Remix this 6-second clip in a Cyberpunk template style — keep the subject's motion, restyle the environment with neon and rain reflections. Remix is the keyword Google itself spotlights in the UI.

item-5.title: Chat-Edit a Generated Scene
item-5.description: Take the video you just made and replace the red jacket with a navy one, add a subtle camera shake, and lengthen the final shot by two seconds. — A typical chat-editing follow-up prompt.

item-6.title: Cinematic Short from a Single Prompt
item-6.description: Generate a 10-second short: ancient ruins at golden hour, slow drone push-in, epic orchestral cue — one prompt, cinematic motion, native audio, ready for vertical social posts.
